zsh/plugins/fzf-tab.notes: corrected baseline: this is the ACTUAL pinned commit on main (previous entry recorded 24105b15..., the upstream target, not the real pin — data error, not a regression). The two LS_COLORS fixes from issue #60 are still not applied; #60 was closed deferring to dependabot.yml's weekly gitsubmodule updates, but zero dependabot PRs have materialized for any submodule since that config landed. Not re-filed as a new issue (duplicate of #60's finding) — flagged to the user directly that the automation appears inactive.

theme/delta.notes: corrected baseline: actual pinned commit on main (previous entry recorded 011516f5..., not the real pin). Issue #196 filed for mocha contrast/decoration fixes since this pin.
